Name: Ho-Oh
Effects: This attack does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Discard an Energy from this Pokémon.

Name: Reshiram
Effects: This attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
If Zekrom is on your Bench, this attack does 80 more damage.

Name: Kyogre
Effects: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck, and then choose 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each Energy card you discarded in this way to each of those Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Name: Palkia
Ability-Effect: As long as this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, your opponent can't play any Stadium cards from their hand.
Effects: During your next turn, this Pokémon's Overdrive Smash attack does 80 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Pikachu
Effects: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon also does 10 damage to itself.

Name: Flying Pikachu V
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Flying Pikachu VMAX
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Surfing Pikachu V
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Surfing Pikachu VMAX
Effects: This attack also does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon VMAX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 3 Prize cards.

Name: Zekrom
Effects: If your opponent has a Stadium in play, discard it.
If Reshiram is on your Bench, this attack does 80 more damage.

Name: Mew
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at the top 6 cards of your deck, reveal an Item card you find there, and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Xerneas
Effects: Search your deck for up to 3 basic Energy cards of different types and attach them to your Pokémon in any way you like. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Cosmog
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

Name: Cosmoem
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks.

Name: Lunala
Effects: Double the number of damage counters on each of your opponent's Pokémon.
This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Name: Zacian V
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may search your deck for a [P] Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck. If you use this Ability, your turn ends.
Effects: This attack does 30 more damage for each [P] Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Groudon
Effects: Discard the top 5 cards of your deck. This attack does 80 damage for each Energy card you discarded in this way.

Name: Zamazenta V
Ability-Effect: All of your [F] Pokémon take 20 less damage from attacks from your opponent's Pokémon VMAX (after applying Weakness and Resistance). You can't apply more than 1 Growl of the Shield Ability at a time.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon V is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Yveltal
Effects: Discard up to 3 Special Energy from your opponent's Pokémon.

Name: Dialga
Effects: Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.
This attack does 20 more damage for each [M] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Solgaleo
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.
Effects: Attach up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Name: Lugia
Effects: This attack does 20 damage for each Energy attached to both Active Pokémon.
During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

Name: Professor's Research
Description: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

Name: Professor's Research
Description: Discard your hand and draw 7 cards.

Name: Mew
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, if this Pokémon is in the Active Spot, you may look at the top 6 cards of your deck, reveal an Item card you find there, and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Blastoise
Ability-Effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach 1 [W] Energy card to 1 of your [W] Pokémon. (This doesn't use up your 1 Energy card attachment for the turn.) This power can't be used if Blastoise is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.
Effects: Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each [W] Energy attached to Blastoise but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra [W] Energy after the 2nd doesn't count.

Name: Charizard
Ability-Effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may turn all Energy attached to Charizard into [R] Energy for the rest of the turn. This power can't be used if Charizard is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.
Effects: Discard 2 Energy cards attached to Charizard in order to use this attack.

Name: Venusaur
Ability-Effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may take 1 [G] Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to a different one. This power can't be used if Venusaur is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Name: Imposter Professor Oak
Description: Your opponent shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck, then draws 7 cards.

Name: Dark Gyarados
Ability-Effect: When Dark Gyarados is Knocked Out by an attack, flip a coin. If heads, this power does 20 damage for each [W] Energy attached to Dark Gyarados to the Pokémon that Knocked Out Dark Gyarados. Apply Weakness and Resistance. This power doesn't work if Dark Gyarados is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Here Comes Team Rocket!
Description: Each player turns all of his or her Prize cards face up. (Those Prize cards remain face up for the rest of the game.)

Name: Rocket's Zapdos
Effects: If there are any [L] Energy cards in your discard pile, attach 1 of them to Rocket's Zapdos.
Rocket's Zapdos does damage to itself equal to 10 times the number of [L] Energy cards attached to it.

Name: _____'s Pikachu
Effects: If it's not your birthday, this attack does 30 damage. If it is your birthday, flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 50 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage.

Name: Cleffa
Ability-Effect: If this Baby Pokémon is your Active Pokémon and your opponent tries to attack, your opponent flips a coin (before doing anything required in order to use that attack). If tails, your opponent's turn ends without an attack.
Effects: Shuffle your hand into your deck, then draw 7 cards.

Name: Shining Magikarp
Effects: Your opponent may draw 2 cards. Either way, you may draw 2 cards.
Search your deck for a card named Gyarados, Dark Gyarados, or Shining Gyarados. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Name: Team Magma's Groudon
Ability-Effect: As long as the number of Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) that has Team Magma in its name is 3 or less, Team Magma's Groudon can't attack.
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
If the Defending Pokémon already has at least 2 damage counters on it, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage.

Name: Rocket's Admin.
Description: Each player shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck. Then, each player counts his or her Prize cards left and draws up to that many cards. (You draw your cards first.)

Name: Mew ex
Ability-Effect: Mew ex can use the attacks of all Pokémon in play as its own. (You still need the necessary Energy to use each attack.)
Effects: Search your deck for an Energy card and attach it to Mew ex. Shuffle your deck afterward. Then, you may switch Mew ex with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Gardevoir ex
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Gardevoir ex is your Active Pokémon, you may put an Imprison Marker on 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. Any Pokémon that has any Imprison markers on it can't use any Poké-Powers or Poké-Bodies. This power can't be used if Gardevoir ex is affected by a Special Condition.
Effects: You may move a [R] Energy card attached to Gardevoir ex to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Umbreon Star
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, when you put Umbreon Star from your hand onto your Bench, your may choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking and discard it.
Effects: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on that Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: You can't have more than 1 Pokémon Star in your deck.

Name: Claydol
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose up to 2 cards from your hand and put them on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you do, draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand. This power can't be used if Claydol is affected by a Special Condition.

Name: Luxray GL LV.X
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Luxray GL LV.X from your hand onto your Active Luxray GL, you may switch the Defending Pokémon with 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
Effects: Does 30 damage to 1 of your Pokémon, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Luxray GL. Luxray GL LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Garchomp C LV.X
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Garchomp C LV.X from your hand onto your Active Garchomp C, you may remove all damage counters from each of your Pokémon SP.
Effects: Discard 2 Energy attached to Garchomp C. Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 80 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Garchomp C can't use Dragon Rush during your next turn.
Ex-Rule: Put this card onto your Active Garchomp C. Garchomp C LV.X can use any attack, Poké-Power, or Poké-Body from its previous Level.

Name: Donphan
Ability-Effect: Any damage done to Donphan by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).
Effects: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Name: Reshiram
Effects: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
Discard 2 [R] Energy attached to this Pokémon.

Name: Zekrom
Effects: Does 10 more damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.
This Pokémon does 40 damage to itself.

Name: Mewtwo-EX
Effects: Does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to this Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon.
Discard an Energy attached to this Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Xerneas-EX
Effects: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
This Pokémon can't use X Blast during your next turn.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: M Rayquaza-EX
Ability-Effect: You may play this card from your hand to evolve a Pokémon during your first turn or the turn you play that Pokémon.
Effects: This attack does 30 damage times the number of your Benched Pokémon.
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon ex is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Name: Tapu Lele-GX
Ability-Effect: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: This attack does 20 damage times the amount of Energy attached to both Active Pokémon. This damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.
Heal all damage from 2 of your Benched Pokémon. (You can't use more than 1 GX attack in a game.)
Ex-Rule: When your Pokémon GX is Knocked out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
